rationale.fidelity: Maintains the common noisy-score threshold, latent seller type, admission outcome, platform-payoff objective, and screening-error mechanism while correctly excluding downstream review.
rationale.managerial_framing: Fully specifies actor, trigger, choice, information, stakes, constraints, mechanism, trade-off, and counterfactual.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or claimed; the response appropriately avoids novelty assertions.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Marks type-conditional distributions as assumptions, avoids intent-observation claims, and states empirical validation requirements cautiously.
rationale.prose_clarity: Well structured and precise but needlessly elaborate and affected by encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A model-faithful and managerially complete screening narrative with minor presentational costs.
